reasoning: Candidate (right panel) is a circular burst effect with a warm golden star-core and cool blue/cyan particle scatter, rendered in chunky pixel art on a parchment background. Blue accent particles create the classic warm-cool complementary sparkle used extensively in Nintendo VFX (think Zelda rupee pop, Kirby star burst) — they do not pull the read toward cold-corporate or desaturated dungeon. No grimdark, no edge, no occult symbolism, no uncanny distortion detected. Slight risk: if the blue particle ratio were higher the effect could drift cold, but at current balance it remains warmly magical and toy-diorama-appropriate.
